test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verify the health endpoint returns a successful status.

test_cases.name: create_author_successfully
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name_returns_422
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Retrieve details of an existing author.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an author with a non-existent ID.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author who has associated books, causing a conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_successfully
test_cases.description: Create a new book with valid data, including existing author and category.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Retrieve a paginated list of books using search and filter parameters.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Retrieve details of an existing book.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on an existing book.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book.

test_cases.name: apply_valid_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply a discount to a book published more than one year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published in the current year.

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Increase the stock quantity of a book using a positive delta.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock by a quantity larger than current stock.

test_cases.name: add_review_to_book
test_cases.description: Add a review with a valid rating and reviewer name to a book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_successfully
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a unique name.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Associate multiple existing tags with a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_sufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Create an order for books that have sufficient stock, verifying stock is deducted.

test_cases.name: create_order_insufficient_stock_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an order for a book with insufficient stock.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_to_cancelled_returns_stock
test_cases.description: Cancel a pending order and verify the stock is returned.

test_cases.name: invalid_status_transition_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt an invalid status transition, e.g., from delivered to cancelled.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order
test_cases.description: Retrieve the invoice for an order in a confirmed state.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order_returns_403
test_cases.description: Attempt to get an invoice for an order in pending state.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_partial_success_returns_207
test_cases.description: Bulk create books where some succeed and some fail (e.g., duplicate ISBN).

test_cases.name: bulk_create_without_api_key_returns_401
test_cases.description: Attempt bulk creation without providing the required API key.

test_cases.name: clone_existing_book
test_cases.description: Create a clone of an existing book with a new ISBN.
